title: Lifecycle of E-Waste and Management Strategies
description: A flowchart illustrating the complete journey of electronic waste from generation through various management strategies, highlighting consumer responsibility, processing methods, and final outcomes.
relationships: Recovery distinguishes materials for Processing or Disposal
Processing extracts valuable materials for reuse
Disposal is the last resort for non-recoverable waste
Reuse & Refurbishment is an alternative path from Collection that avoids processing
